title: LEBANON HABITAT RESTORE - 211info
text: LEBANON AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY LEBANON HABITAT RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells wholesale donations (new) from distributors or small stores due to overstock or leftover inventory and new and gently used items donated by the community. Products may include hardware, tools, building materials, home goods, lighting, and furniture. 566 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Thursday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Drop Off Hours: Wednesday-Friday 10am-4pm, Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 451-1234 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers ReStore (541) 451-1234 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County SITE HOURS: Thursday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR AND PRESERVATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
